since_last: 64% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.33%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC -0.77% · Gold +0.31% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 64% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.33%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.33%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.31%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: POWL is the standout at +4.19%
cards.body: Leaders: POWL +4.19%, SKHY +3.82%, BABA +3.82%, BIDU +3.80%, MU +2.58%. Laggards: EQIX -3.97%, DV -1.93%, NXE -1.14%, CRM -1.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.77% at $126.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.77% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
